description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image, with a global before_script that installs the now CLI globally via npm install -g now --unsafe-perm. Define three stages: ver, init, and deploy. In the ver stage add a ver job that runs node --version and whoami. In the init stage add an init job that runs npm install. In the deploy stage add two jobs: deploy_production (runs only on the master branch, sets the production environment at https://docs.iota.org/ and executes now -t ${NOW_TOKEN} --team iota, now -t ${NOW_TOKEN} --team iota alias -A ci-prod.json, then echo "Deployed to production server"); and deploy_staging (runs only on the develop branch, sets the staging environment at https://docs.staging.iota.org/ and runs now -t ${NOW_TOKEN} --team iota, now -t ${NOW_TOKEN} --team iota alias -A ci-staging.json, then echo "Deployed to staging server").
